fix_1_contact_quality_blend.rationale: On 2025 holdout (n=340), full-blend RMSE = 0.0359 vs wOBA-only baseline RMSE = 0.0371. Gain = +1.2 wOBA-points. Threshold met -> ADOPT full blend; ROS estimator uses learned wOBA + xwOBA + EV_p90 + HardHit + Barrel + prior coefficients.

fix_2_hierarchical_labeling.path_taken: A: integrated hierarchical fit into production

summary.labeling_decision: Hierarchical (partial-pooling NUTS) IS the production wOBA + xwOBA estimator in R3. Per-player conjugate Beta-Binomial is dropped from the production wOBA path; it remains a sanity check for the rate-stat side-channels (BB%, K%, BABIP, ISO, HardHit%, Barrel%) that don't enter the production blend at all. Codex's R2 critique that the hierarchical fit was 'window dressing' is now closed.
summary.kappa_interpretation: kappa is the universe-shared concentration of the Beta prior on each player's true rate. Higher kappa -> stronger pooling toward each player's 3-year-weighted prior. Posterior q50 ~ 200 means the prior carries ~200 effective PA of weight per player.

fix_3_stabilization_bootstrap_estimand.method: Direct player-season bootstrap: sample N player-seasons from 1,433 qualifying with replacement (no cap at one season per player).

fix_4_varland_coherence.rule: Sleeper and fake-dominant lists are MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE: a reliever flagged fake-dominant cannot also be on sleeper list. Varland excluded from sleeper; remains on fake-dominant.

mason_miller.evidence: K%-only verdict (streak model killed). April K% 0.650 on 40 BF; 3yr prior K% 0.407; R3 posterior K% q50 = 0.495 (rise of +0.089 that survives heavy reliever-K% shrinkage). Streak survival probabilities are killed; the K% rise is the only durable signal.

killed_picks_from_r2: hitter: Dingler, Dillon (was in R2 top-10 sleepers; no longer top-15 under R3 learned blend)
hitter: Vargas, Ildemaro (was in R2 top-10 sleepers; no longer top-15 under R3 learned blend)
hitter: Lopez, Otto (was in R2 top-10 sleepers; no longer top-15 under R3 learned blend)
reliever: Varland, Louis (was R2 top-5 sleeper; not top-5 R3 — coherence rule: he is fake-dominant; cannot be sleeper)
reliever: Lynch, Daniel (was R2 top-5 sleeper; not top-5 R3 — coherence rule: he is fake-dominant; cannot be sleeper)

verdicts_changed_from_r2.reason: R2 SIGNAL came from a hand-tuned 50/50 wOBA+xwOBA blend; R3 learned blend on 2025 holdout reduces xwOBA's weight and raises prior's weight — the partial-pooling posterior on Rice's wOBA shrinks back to within prior uncertainty.

R2 SIGNAL was the same hand-tuned blend artifact; R3 learned coefficients put 0.165 on xwOBA, 0.279 on prior, -0.024 on raw wOBA. Trout's prior is .362; even with elite contact quality his ROS posterior delta crosses zero.

_methodology_notes.varland_choice: FAKE-DOMINANT (obs - post = +.113 cleared the 0.08 gap; excluded from sleeper list per coherence rule. The 3-year weighted prior is the methodologically defensible choice over a late-2025 closer-window prior.)
_methodology_notes.reliever_coherence_rule: Sleeper and fake-dominant lists are mutually exclusive: any reliever flagged as fake-dominant (obs >= 0.30 AND obs-post >= 0.08) is removed from sleeper consideration.

mason_miller.name: Mason Miller
